pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release target from Java 17 to Java 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against Java 17 APIs, failing to enforce Java 21 compatibility or utilize Java 21 features if intended.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the maven-compiler-plugin to version 3.11.0 to ensure full support for Java 21 compilation features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the compiler plugin may not correctly handle Java 21 bytecode generation or module path configurations.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the maven-surefire-plugin to version 3.2.2 to ensure compatibility with Java 21 test execution.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Surefire versions may fail to launch tests on Java 21 due to internal API changes or module restrictions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the maven-javadoc-plugin to version 3.6.3 to support Java 21 documentation generation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Javadoc plugins may crash or produce invalid output when processing Java 21 source code or module descriptors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the maven-checkstyle-plugin to version 3.2.2 and Checkstyle to 10.9.3 to support Java 21 syntax analysis.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Checkstyle versions do not parse Java 21 syntax (e.g., pattern matching for switch) and will fail during the check phase.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the Nexus Staging Maven Plugin with the Central Publishing Maven Plugin to adapt to Sonatype's new publishing infrastructure.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old Nexus Staging plugin is deprecated and no longer functional for publishing to Maven Central via the new Central Publisher Portal.
